ciliary_role: Critical regulator of cilia formation and morphology (26518474). Controls ciliary proteincomposition. Functions redundantly with NPHP4 to regulate cilium integrity, transition zone docking and assembly of membrane to microtubule Y- link connectors. Recruits ciliopathy proteins MKS1, TMEM231 and TMEM237. Mutated in OFD and JBTS patients (26595381). In mice, mutations decrease cilia number and disrupt Hh sig ling. Essential for craniofacial development (28954202). Acts synergistically with Gli2 as a positive mediator of Shh and ciliogenesis (22698544). Loss of Tmem107 results in disruption in early L- R patterning events at the node (31887266).
ciliopathy_type: Joubert Syndrome, Meckel–Gruber Syndrome, Orofaciodigital Syndrome
